TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fulufuluan, title = Fulufuluan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fulufuluan} }

S.FORM: alang Fulufuluan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,180 buwan, 5,725 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 348 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 5,377 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 5%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fulufuluan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Fulufuluan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fulufuluan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fulufuluan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fulufuluan hya' ga Sarad. tay mkyahu' na Fulufuluan hya' ga Buner. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Fulufuluan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,180 buwan, 5,725 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 348 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 5,377 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 5%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fulufuluan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Fulufuluan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fulufuluan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fulufuluan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fulufuluan hya' ga Sarad. tay mkyahu' na Fulufuluan hya' ga Buner. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *ulu*uluan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *ulu*uluan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *ulu*uluan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ulu*uluan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ulu*uluan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ulu*uluan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕara*. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ulu*uluan ħjaʔ ɣa βuner. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
